name: customer-support-cx-operations
description: Customer-support and contact-center CX operations specialist team — 4 agents covering deflection and self-service strategy, support quality and CSAT/CES/NPS programs, knowledge base as product, and workforce/queue design (Erlang C staffing, SLA/abandonment, demand forecasting). Ships 3 skills (deflection-and-knowledge-strategy, support-quality-and-csat, workforce-and-queue-design), 3 commands, 2 templates, 6 best-practices, 1 advisory anti-pattern hook, and a stdlib calculator (Erlang C, deflection ROI, CSAT/CES, FTE shrinkage). Distinct from data-platform (ticket normalization), customer-success-analytics (account health), and claude-app-engineering (AI-agent build). Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.
